FR-01.title: Policy Browsing and Comparison
requirements: Implement complete policy browsing and comparison functionality

policy browsing and comparison data persists correctly across sessions

FR-01.title: Build Policy Browsing and Comparison API
FR-01.description: Create REST API endpoints for policy browsing and comparison feature in Insurance Management Platform. Implement business logic, validation, database operations, and error handling. Add authentication and authorization checks.

FR-01.title: Build Policy Browsing and Comparison UI
FR-01.description: Create user interface components for policy browsing and comparison. Implement responsive design with form validation, loading states, error handling, and smooth transitions. Connect to API endpoints.

FR-01.title: Write Policy Browsing and Comparison Tests
FR-01.description: Write unit and integration tests for policy browsing and comparison feature. Cover happy path, error cases, edge cases, and validation rules. Achieve minimum 80% coverage.
